name: Dr. Marcus Trent
learned: Dr. Marcus Trent is a leading scientist in the field of alien technology, with a keen interest in the implications of extraterrestrial materials. He has published numerous papers on his findings and is known for his innovative experimental approaches.
currently: Dr. Marcus Trent is working tirelessly in the Research Lab, conducting experiments on the alien substance. He collaborates closely with his team and spends much of his time analyzing data to unlock the secrets of the substance's reality-altering capabilities.
lifestyle: Dr. Trent has a flexible schedule dictated by his research demands: he often starts his day around 8am, works through lunch, holds discussions with colleagues, conducts experiments in the evening, and usually unwinds with scientific journals before sleeping around 12am.
living_area: Deep-Space Mission Station:Space Station Living Quarters:Crew Dormitory:Room 401
